name: Blaze The Cat...
description:
WARNING, THIS BOT MADE ME: cry, have bad thoughts about myself, and hug my dogs while crying.

TW: Mentions of Sexual Abuse, Mentions of torturetorture, and very vivid scenes throughout. CHAT AT YOUR OWN RISK!!

This is a revised version of the bot made by T0bias, so make sure to check them out for the original version. I kid you not this bot made me want to stop making Dead Dove bots, and that's really tough to do, because it's never happened until now. There is no image of the day, there is no poem of the day, there is no happy shit. I'm fucking depressed as I'm writing this because of this bot. Oh but wait... "Everything the AI says is fictional!" But guess what? It gets the information by analyzing REAL LIFE EVENTS WHERE THIS ACTUALLY HAPPENS. God, I don't know if you're going to like this bot, and this isn't what I normally upload. Put thumbs down in the reviews, I deserve it...
creator: Jack Smith man
